package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_nested_slice_scans: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag nested slice scans that should be indexed or mapped before joining large collections.
type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScans(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRepeatedNestedSliceScansDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, a := range items {
        for _, b := range items {
            if a.ID == b.ID && a.Amount > b.Amount {
                _ = a.Amount - b.Amount
            }
        }
    }
    perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "algorithmic": 3, "complexity": 4, "repeated": 5, "nested": 6}
    perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    algorithmic_positive_2 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["algorithmic"] + len(input)
    _ = algorithmic_positive_2
    complexity_positive_3 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["complexity"] + len(input)
    _ = complexity_positive_3
    repeated_positive_4 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["repeated"] + len(input)
    _ = repeated_positive_4
    nested_positive_5 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_positive["nested"] + len(input)
    _ = nested_positive_5
    return nil
}
